reason: All steps executed successfully: Agent found in sidebar, status verified as "idle", message sent, and response received with correct answer "4" in 2 seconds.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Successfully loaded the Gamut application homepage showing Your Agents section with two agents listed.

Found and clicked "QA-20260714-203345-qqvl" agent in the sidebar — Successfully navigated to the agent's home page at URL /agents/qa-20260714-203345-qqvl-og6x4cd9pl with agent name displayed in header.
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Agent status shows "idle" in the top right corner of the page (confirmed in screenshot).
Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message typed in input field and sent by clicking send button, which created a new session titled "Basic Math Question Session".
Waited up to 3 minutes for response — Response received in 2 seconds (shown as "Worked for 2s" in the chat).
Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot — Agent responded with "4" which is the correct answer to 2+2, visible in the chat message list.
